sourceMovie.title: A Dog's Purpose
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Audiences latched onto A Dog's Purpose (2017) as a adventure theatrical experience: big enough for a group watch, specific enough to reward a second viewing once you know where it's headed. The adventure and comedy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Puss in Boots: The Last Wish
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If A Dog's Purpose clicked for you, Puss in Boots: The Last Wish (2022) is a strong next stop: both trade in adventure and comedy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after A Dog's Purpose?
faq.answer: Try Puss in Boots: The Last Wish, Clifford the Big Red Dog, Wish Dragon—each shares DNA with A Dog's Purpose while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is A Dog's Purpose?
faq.answer: A Dog's Purpose (2017) is best described as Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Family, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is A Dog's Purpose part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "A Dog's Purpose Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
